summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Territory Atlas map visualization app. All backend APIs (22/22 tests passed) and frontend features working correctly. Map renders with Mapbox GL JS, county choropleth shading visible, clustered point markers display, layer controls functional, radius circles work with 25/50/100mi options, satellite/street view toggle works, analytics panel shows top states.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/data/city returns city data with proper structure (PASS)
Backend: GET /api/data/county returns county data with proper structure (PASS)
Backend: GET /api/data/wheat returns wheat data with Acres layer (PASS)
Backend: GET /api/analytics/top-zones returns aggregated top states (PASS)
Backend: Data integrity - all datasets have records loaded (PASS)
Backend: City coordinates within valid US bounds (PASS)
Frontend: Mapbox map renders with base tiles visible (PASS)
Frontend: County choropleth density shading appears with correct colors (purple=Acres dominant) (PASS)
Frontend: Point markers with clustering render on map (dark gray clusters with numbers) (PASS)
Frontend: Sidebar layer controls - all 8 layers have toggles (PASS)
Frontend: Layer toggle functionality changes map visibility (PASS)
Frontend: Radius toggle for Customers/Feed Mills/Grain Fumigation works (PASS)
Frontend: Radius size buttons (25mi, 50mi, 100mi) change circle size (PASS)
Frontend: Satellite/Street View toggle button works (PASS)
Frontend: Analytics panel shows top states with totals (Kansas #1 with 6.6M) (PASS)
Frontend: Upload buttons for City/County/Wheat data visible (PASS)
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: MapDashboard.js has React Hook useEffect missing dependency warning for fetchTopZones - consider adding to dependency array or using useCallback
Minor: Console warnings about unknown properties in radius-circles source (x-file-name, x-line-number, etc.) - these are development artifacts that don't affect functionality
test_credentials: No authentication required. Mapbox token already configured in .env
seed_data_creation: Data already loaded in MongoDB from previous session - 525 city records, 1859 county records, wheat data with Acres layer
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working. Data is pre-loaded in MongoDB. Key test data-testids: map-container, analytics-panel, top-zone-{n}, map-style-toggle, layer-toggle-{layerName}, radius-toggle-{layerName}, radius-miles-{layerName}-{miles}. Mapbox needs 3-5 seconds to load tiles after page load.

backend_apis.GET /api/data/city: Returns 525 city records with lat/lon and layers (Feed Mills, Hog Producers, Grain Fumigation, Customers)
backend_apis.GET /api/data/county: Returns 1859 county records with layers (1000-plus Acre Growers, Growers with On Farm Storage, Grain Retail Handlers)
backend_apis.GET /api/data/wheat: Returns wheat data with Acres layer
backend_apis.GET /api/analytics/top-zones: Returns top 10 states aggregated by active layers

frontend_features.map_rendering: Mapbox GL JS renders US map with base tiles
frontend_features.choropleth: County-level density shading with purple (Acres), yellow (1000-plus Acre Growers), green (On Farm Storage), teal (Grain Retail Handlers)
frontend_features.point_markers: Clustered markers with dark gray circles showing point counts
frontend_features.layer_controls: 8 layer toggles in sidebar, all functional
frontend_features.radius_circles: Turf.js radius circles for Customers, Feed Mills, Grain Fumigation with 25/50/100mi options
frontend_features.analytics_panel: Shows top 10 states with total opportunities (37M+ total)
